title: Over There - AEF Rifleman, Spring 1918
startLocation: AEF training camp near Chaumont, France
opening: Six weeks off the boat and the war still feels like a rumor: drill, mud, bayonet practice on straw men, and letters home you don't know how to finish. Tonight that changes. Sergeant Calloway walks the barracks line with a clipboard and a face like bad weather - your company is moving up to a quiet sector of the line to relieve a French battalion. 'Quiet,' the French soldiers grin as they hand over the trench maps, 'is a word for officers.'

squad.name: Pvt. Eli Mills
squad.trait: youngest in the squad, writes everything down

squad.name: Pvt. Tommy Reyes
squad.trait: fastest man in the company, hates the dark

squad.name: Doc Whitaker
squad.trait: older than the rest, seen too much already

timelinePressure: 1918-03-21 The German Spring Offensive (Operation Michael) breaks the quiet everywhere
1918-04-20 Trench raid at Seicheprey tests green American units
1918-05-28 The first American offensive at Cantigny
1918-06-01 Belleau Wood - the fight that makes the AEF's name
